title: NovaTerra
description: A kitchen sink modpack with focus on Exploration, decoration, and mechanicians
body:
Welcome to NovaTerra a modpack built for Exploration, decorating, and grand machine building. 
 
With the world changed by mod like Tectonic, William Wythers' Expanded Ecosphere, and Alex's Caves
there is so much to Explore! 

and when you find that perfect little spot to call home you can decorate it just how you want it with thousands of new blocks from mods like Chipped, Cluttered, and FramedBlocks

and when you want to automate everything so you can relax you have plenty of choices from Create to Applied Energistics 2, and Mekanism


















mod attribution:
